data.title: Spotlight Medical AI pathology assay published in Journal of Clinical Oncology identifies low-risk subgroup in high-risk ER+/HER2- breast cancer patients. Study validates assay on CANTO and UNIRAD trials.
data.description: In Paris, Spotlight Medical revealed that a recent peer-reviewed study in the Journal of Clinical Oncology introduced a clinicopathologic assay identifying a significant portion of patients (ER-positive, HER2-negative early breast cancer) categorized as clinical high risk. These patients demonstrated a positive long-term outlook following standard chemo-endocrine therapy solely. The research involved two prospective cohorts from the CANTO and UNIRAD trials, providing validation. This study highlighted a crucial unmet need in current treatment strategies.

data.title: Wall Street forecasts higher Q2 earnings for KE Holdings (NASDAQ: BEKE). Expected earnings per share: $1.14 (up from 97 cents last year), revenue: $1.12 billion (up from $992.25 million last year). KE reported 42.4% Y/Y rise in Q1 net revenues to 23.3 billion Chinese Yuan ($3.21 billion), beating $3.09 billion consensus.
data.description: KE Holdings Inc., a company based in Hollywood, Florida and listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BEKE, is set to announce its earnings report for the second quarter on Tuesday, August 26. Analysts are anticipating quarterly earnings to stand at $1.14 per share, a substantial increase from the 97 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to reach $1.12 billion, a rise from $992.25 million in the previous year. The company previously disclosed that its net revenues for the first quarter surged by 42.4% year-over-year to 23.3 billion Chinese Yuan ($3.21 billion), surpassing the consensus estimate of $3.09 billion. The full information is available for review on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pet Butler franchise expands in Iowa with acquisition of Bark 'N' Bin, local pet waste removal business in Des Moines.
data.description: In Des Moines, Iowa on August 25, 2025, Pet Butler revealed that Patrick Lanigan, a committed franchise owner, has finalized the purchase of Bark 'N' Bin. This local pet waste removal service operates in the Des Moines, IA region. Following this acquisition, Patrick now has ownership of Bark 'N' Bin.

data.title: Jyske Bank initiates a share repurchase programme worth up to DKK 2.25 billion until 30 Jan 2026, following EU regulations.
data.description: Starting on 26 February 2025 until 30 January 2026, Jyske Bank has launched a share repurchase program. During this period, the bank plans to buy back shares totaling up to DKK 2.25 billion, as announced in Corporate Announcement No. 3/2025 dated 26 February 2025. The share repurchase program adheres to the EU Commission Regulation No. 596/2014 of 16 April 2014, known as the “Market Abuse Regulation,” and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016, collectively referred to as the "Safe Harbour Rules."
The British government has announced plans to reform its asylum appeals process. It comes as public pressure mounts on the issue, as CGTN Europe’s Jeff Moody reports.

data.title: Vacuum Evaporators Market projected to reach $4.91 billion by 2030, detailed in an exclusive report by MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 25, 2025, a report was released on the Vacuum Evaporators Market. The report covers various technologies including Heat Pump, Mechanical Vapor Recompression, and Thermal, as well as applications such as Wastewater Treatment and Product Processing. It also focuses on end-use industries like Food & Beverage and Pharmaceutical. This market analysis spans across regions worldwide and provides insights into the growing demand for vacuum evaporators. Key numbers and data regarding market size, growth trends, and regional distribution were highlighted, making it a comprehensive overview of the industry's landscape.

data.title: Analyst predicts Solana could soar to new highs if it reclaims $210-$220 level; currently 32% away from all-time high of $294.33.
data.description: Predictions are circulating about Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) potentially reaching record highs following Ethereum's (CRYPTO: ETH) recent peak. Angel investor and cryptocurrency observer Ted Pillows suggested that a reclaim of the $210-$220 level could propel SOL to new highs in a few weeks. Currently, SOL is 32% below its all-time high of $294.33. Year-to-date, the coin has only experienced a 5.58% increase, with a 27% growth over the past year. The market is closely monitoring SOL's performance as it approaches this critical price level. For further details, visit the story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Phoenix Financial Ltd. reports Q2 and H1 2025 results, a leading Israel-based asset management company.
data.description: In Tel-Aviv, Israel, a renowned asset management, insurance, and investment firm, Phoenix Financial Ltd. (TLV:PHOE), previously known as Phoenix Holdings, shared its performance figures for the initial six months of 2025. The company unveiled the data on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Trader launches $2M campaign post $3M freeze by MEXC. Claimed outperformance led to being sidelined.
data.description: The trader stated that they had surpassed the performance of the external market makers at MEXC and were excluded from trading due to being deemed "too profitable."
